channel.title: Laboratory Accreditation on QA & University Performance Department
channel.description: Recent content in Laboratory Accreditation on QA & University Performance Department

item.title: Documents & Records
item.description:
Documents and Records

The Quality Assurance Department provides the reference documentation that colleges and laboratories need to complete laboratory accreditation procedures in line with the adopted international standards.

Document Types

Standards Documents

  • ISO/IEC 17025:2017
  • Implementation guidance manuals
  • Detailed accreditation requirements

Procedural Documents

  • Laboratory quality manual
  • Laboratory operating procedures
  • Equipment calibration procedures
  • Result-verification procedures

Records

  • Training records
  • Maintenance records
  • Test records
  • Customer-complaint records
  • Non-conformity records

Forms

  • Test-request forms
  • Test-report forms
  • Laboratory-evaluation forms
  • Management-review forms

References

  • ISO/IEC 17025:2017 — General requirements for the competence of testing and calibration laboratories
  • ILAC G19 — Modules in a Forensic Science Process
  • ISO 15189:2022 — Medical laboratories
  • Iraqi Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research guidance

To obtain documents: contact the Accreditation Division in the department.

item.title: Laboratory Inventory
item.description:
Laboratory Inventory

The Quality Assurance Department maintains an up-to-date database of every laboratory across the colleges and centers of Al-Qadisiyah University, covering:

Inventory Data

Basic Information

  • Laboratory name
  • Owning college or department
  • Area and location
  • Laboratory supervisor
  • Disciplines served

Equipment

  • List of major instruments
  • Year of acquisition
  • Operational status
  • Maintenance schedule

Capabilities

  • Approved tests and analyses
  • Services provided to the university
  • Services provided to external parties
  • Research outputs

Inventory Objectives

  • Maintain a comprehensive database to inform management decisions
  • Identify needs and gaps
  • Plan expansions and upgrades
  • Facilitate inter-laboratory cooperation
  • Prepare accreditation files

Updating the Inventory

Inventory data is updated annually via dedicated forms circulated to the colleges; submissions are reviewed in the department before being formally adopted.

item.title: Laboratory Landscape
item.description:
Laboratory Landscape at Al-Qadisiyah University

Al-Qadisiyah University hosts a wide network of scientific, teaching and research laboratories distributed across its colleges; they are a cornerstone of both the academic and the research mission.

Laboratories by College

College of Medicine

  • Anatomy laboratories
  • Physiology laboratories
  • Biochemistry laboratories
  • Microbiology laboratories
  • Histology and pathology laboratories

College of Pharmacy

  • Pharmaceutical-chemistry laboratories
  • Pharmaceutics laboratories
  • Pharmacognosy laboratories
  • Toxicology laboratories

College of Engineering

  • Mechanical laboratories
  • Electrical and electronics laboratories
  • Fluid and thermal laboratories
  • Materials and structures laboratories

College of Science

  • Chemistry laboratories
  • Physics laboratories
  • Biology laboratories
  • Earth-sciences laboratories

College of Agriculture

  • Soil and water laboratories
  • Plant-production laboratories
  • Animal-production laboratories
  • Food-technology laboratories

College of Veterinary Medicine

  • Parasitology laboratories
  • Animal-pathology laboratories
  • Animal-production laboratories

College of Computer Science and IT

  • Programming laboratories
  • Networks laboratories
  • Artificial-intelligence laboratories

Challenges and Opportunities

  • Some equipment requires modernization
  • Expanding accreditation to additional laboratories
  • Strengthening inter-laboratory cooperation
  • Building the capacity of technical staff

item.title: Laboratory Safety
item.description:
Laboratory Safety

Laboratory safety is a top priority at Al-Qadisiyah University; the Quality Assurance Department promotes a culture of safety across every laboratory and monitors its implementation.

Principal Standards

Personal Safety

  • Wearing personal protective equipment (PPE) — lab coat, safety glasses, gloves
  • Knowing the location of safety equipment (fire extinguisher, safety shower, eyewash)
  • No food or drink inside the laboratory
  • Tying back long hair and wearing closed-toe shoes

Handling Chemicals

  • Reading safety data sheets (SDS) before working
  • Proper storage of chemicals
  • Using a fume hood when working with volatile substances
  • Segregating incompatible materials

Electrical Safety

  • Inspecting equipment before use
  • Not using damaged equipment
  • Disconnecting from the power source after use
  • Avoiding overloading outlets

Biosafety

  • Operating at the biosafety level appropriate to the laboratory
  • Mandatory vaccinations for relevant staff
  • Safe disposal of biohazardous waste
  • Sterilizing surfaces and tools

Waste Management

  • Segregating waste by type (chemical, biological, sharps, infectious)
  • Using dedicated containers
  • Coordinating with safe-disposal contractors
  • Documenting disposal operations

In Emergencies

Fire

  • Switch off electrical equipment
  • Use the appropriate fire extinguisher
  • Evacuate toward the nearest emergency exit
  • Call emergency services

Chemical Spills

  • Evacuate the area
  • Notify the laboratory supervisor
  • Use protective equipment and follow clean-up procedures
  • Document the incident

Injuries

  • Use the first-aid kit
  • Transfer the injured person to medical emergency services if needed
  • Report immediately and document

Training

The department offers periodic training workshops for laboratory staff on safety procedures, in cooperation with the colleges of Medicine, Pharmacy and Engineering.
